title: helenium pubescens
intro: Helenium pubescens, also known as Rocky Mountain sneezeweed or False Sneezeweed, is a perennial plant native to the western United States and Canada. The plant's roots, leaves, and flowers have been used in herbal medicine for their anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. Helenium pubescens is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues such as congestion and coughs, and soothing skin irritations. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, tinctures, and salves for its medicinal uses.
